Swiss subs were instrumental and Johan Manzambi and Ruben Vargas played their part. Bosnia were getting more a foothold before Manzambi's opener.
Bosnia's cause not helped with the sending off of Tarik Muharemovic and will feel disappointed that the gsme got away from them late on.
21:57
FULL-TIME: Switzerland 4-1 Bosnia-Herzegovina
21:57
SWITZERLAND GOAL - Granit Xhaka
No mistake. 4-1
21:55
SWITZERLAND PENALTY!
Djibril Sow taken down by Amar Memic. Spot kick awarded.
21:53
BOSNIA GOAL - Ermin Mahmic
90+3mins: Switzerland 3-1 Bosnia-Herzegovina
From a corner, the ball is punched clear, falls to Mahmic who blasts it home.
6 mins of added time by the way.
